title: HomeDirConfig
description: Schema for AiProviders HomeDir adapter YAML bundles (*.ai-providers.yaml).

id.description: Stable machine identifier for this HomeDir adapter.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in diagnostics and UIs.

roots.description: Filesystem paths (relative to ~ or absolute) that indicate this tool is installed.

adapter.description: Fully-qualified class name of the HomeDir adapter implementation.
